By the sun and its heat and brightness,Footnote-1
and by the moon as it follows it;
and by the day as it displays the sun's glory,
and by the night as it envelopes the sun;Footnote-2
and by the sky and by Him Who made it;Footnote-3
and by the earth and by Him Who stretched it out;
and by the soul and by Him Who perfectly proportioned it,Footnote-4
and imbued it with (the consciousness of) its evil and its piety:Footnote-5
He who purifies it will prosper,
and he who suppresses it will be ruined.Footnote-6
In their presumptuous insolence the ThamudFootnote-7 called the Truth a lieFootnote-8
when their arch-criminal rose up in rage.
Then Allah's Messenger warned them: “Hands off the she-camel and her drink!”Footnote-9
But they rejected his statement as a lie and hamstrung the she-camel.Footnote-10 For that crime their Lord rumbled down upon them, utterly razing them to the ground.
He has no fear of its sequel.Footnote-11
